nasb.text: For I am with you,’ declares the Lord, ‘to save you; For I will destroy completely all the nations where I have scattered you, Only I will not destroy you completely. But I will chasten you justly And will by no means leave you unpunished.’

esv.text: For I am with you to save you, declares the Lord; I will make a full end of all the nations among whom I scattered you, but of you I will not make a full end. I will discipline you in just measure, and I will by no means leave you unpunished.

cnv.text: 因為我與你同在， 要拯救你； 我要消滅我趕散你去的列國， 卻必不消滅你。 我要按公正懲治你， 決不能免你受罰。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 因为我与你们同在， 要拯救你们。 这是耶和华说的。 我要彻底毁灭列国， 就是我曾使你们流亡的地方。 但我不会彻底毁灭你们， 也不会饶过你们， 我必公正地惩治你们。”
